---
title: Precipitation and Soil Moisture Coupling Constrains Subseasonal Predictability
  of a Prolonged Extreme Heatwave
pagetitle: 2026-2-1-Lv2026 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2026
author: Bingjie Lv, Shuguang Wang, Gang Chen and Baoqiang Xiang
venue: Communications Earth & Environment
venue_cit: <i>Communications Earth & Environment</i>, 7, 323, doi:10.1038/s43247-026-03341-1.
recommended_citation: 'Bingjie Lv, Shuguang Wang, Gang Chen and Baoqiang Xiang, 2026:
  Precipitation and Soil Moisture Coupling Constrains Subseasonal Predictability of
  a Prolonged Extreme Heatwave, <i>Communications Earth & Environment</i>, 7, 323,
  doi:10.1038/s43247-026-03341-1.'
paper_url: https://www.nature.com/articles/s43247-026-03341-1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Precipitation and Soil Moisture Coupling Constrains Subseasonal Predictability of a Prolonged Extreme Heatwave

*Published in Communications Earth & Environment, 2026*

**Recommended citation:** Bingjie Lv, Shuguang Wang, Gang Chen and Baoqiang Xiang, 2026: Precipitation and Soil Moisture Coupling Constrains Subseasonal Predictability of a Prolonged Extreme Heatwave, <i>Communications Earth & Environment</i>, 7, 323, doi:10.1038/s43247-026-03341-1.

[Download paper](https://www.nature.com/articles/s43247-026-03341-1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
